caption:
Neon lights cut through the humidity, catching the sweat on my collarbone as the airlock hissed shut. ✨

The private server room hummed with a low-frequency vibration that I could feel in my teeth. My contact, a corporate ghost in a chrome suit, hovered inches from me, his eyes scanning the haptic data flowing through my nervous system.

"You’re faster than the encryption suggests," he murmured, his voice vibrating against my ear.

I adjusted the collar of my tech-wear jacket, feeling the friction of the synthetic fabric against my skin. My outfit was tailored for agility, yet designed to keep me safe. The reinforced mesh hugged my curves, the high waistline cutting tight to show the dip of my hips, while the structured bodice concealed my chest just enough to keep the silhouette alluring without revealing too much.

The air smelled of ozone and expensive cologne. He reached out, fingers brushing my hip, sending a jolt through the nanowires embedded in my suit. It wasn’t just digital; it was physical. A spark of electricity danced along my spine, syncing our neural frequencies.

"Stay focused," I whispered back, leaning into his touch, the leather of my jacket creaking softly.

The city outside pulsed like a living organism, a kaleidoscope of holographic ads and holographic eyes watching us. But here, in the static, it was just the two of us, heat rising between the chrome floor and my thighs. The mission shifted from data theft to a private connection, a moment of raw sensation in a world of cold code.

#CyberpunkLife #NeonVibes #FutureFashion #TechRomance #InstaStory #NeonNights
